description: Central field schema for EICR/EIC certificates - SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for UI and AI extraction. When UI changes, update this file and the AI will automatically know the new fields.
update_instructions: When adding/modifying UI fields, update this schema. The AI extraction (extract.js) reads this file to know exactly what fields to extract.

circuit_ref.label: Circuit Reference
circuit_ref.ai_guidance: Sequential circuit numbers starting from 1. Examples: 1, 2, 3, or custom like 1a, 1b

circuit_designation.label: Designation
circuit_designation.ai_guidance: Brief description of circuit purpose. Format: 'Lights Kitchen', 'Sockets Ring', 'Cooker', 'Shower', 'Smoke Alarms'. Be specific about location.

wiring_type.label: Wiring Type
wiring_type.ai_guidance: Usually 'A' for domestic (enclosed in conduit in thermally insulating wall). Only use B/C/D if specifically mentioned.

ref_method.label: Reference Method
ref_method.description: Cable sizing reference method per BS7671
ref_method.ai_guidance: Reference method for cable current-carrying capacity. Usually 'A' or 'C' for domestic.

number_of_points.label: Number of Points
number_of_points.ai_guidance: Count of sockets, lights, or outlets on this circuit. Typical: 1-12 for lighting, 4-8 for sockets.

live_csa_mm2.label: Live CSA (mm2)
live_csa_mm2.ai_guidance: Cable size in mm2. Common values: 1.0 (lighting), 2.5 (radials/rings), 4.0, 6.0 (cooker), 10.0 (shower), 16.0

cpc_csa_mm2.label: CPC CSA (mm2)
cpc_csa_mm2.ai_guidance: Earth/CPC cable size in mm2. Usually: 1.0 (with 1.0 live), 1.5 (with 2.5 live), 2.5 (with 6.0 live), 4.0 (with 10.0 live)

max_disconnect_time_s.label: Max Disconnect Time (s)
max_disconnect_time_s.ai_guidance: BS7671 max disconnection time. Usually 0.4s for socket circuits, 0.2s for 3-phase, 5s for distribution circuits.

ocpd_type.label: OCPD Type
ocpd_type.ai_guidance: MCB type. 'B' for domestic (general loads), 'C' for inductive loads (motors), 'D' for high inrush. gG/gM for fuses.

ocpd_breaking_capacity_ka.label: Breaking Capacity (kA)
ocpd_breaking_capacity_ka.ai_guidance: Breaking capacity in kA. Typical domestic: 6kA or 10kA. Check consumer unit label.

ocpd_max_zs_ohm.label: Max Zs (ohm)
ocpd_max_zs_ohm.description: Maximum permitted earth fault loop impedance
ocpd_max_zs_ohm.ai_guidance: Maximum Zs from BS7671 tables. Depends on OCPD type and rating. Example: Type B 32A = 1.37 ohm

rcd_type.label: RCD Type
rcd_type.ai_guidance: RCD type. 'A' most common (AC + pulsating DC). 'AC' for AC only. 'F' for variable speed drives. 'B' for smooth DC.

rcd_operating_current_ma.label: RCD Operating Current (mA)
rcd_operating_current_ma.ai_guidance: RCD sensitivity. Usually 30mA for socket circuits (additional protection). 100mA or 300mA for fire protection.

ring_r1_ohm.label: r1 (ohm)
ring_r1_ohm.ai_guidance: Ring final circuit r1 reading. Should be similar to rn and r2. Typical range 0.2-0.8 ohm depending on cable length.

ring_rn_ohm.label: rn (ohm)
ring_rn_ohm.ai_guidance: Ring final circuit rn reading. Should be similar to r1 and r2.

ring_r2_ohm.label: r2 (ohm)
ring_r2_ohm.ai_guidance: Ring final circuit r2 (CPC) reading. Should be similar to r1 and rn but slightly higher due to smaller CPC.

r1_r2_ohm.label: R1+R2 (ohm)
r1_r2_ohm.ai_guidance: R1+R2 continuity reading. For radials, measured at furthest point. Typical range 0.1-2.0 ohm depending on length.

r2_ohm.label: R2 (ohm)
r2_ohm.ai_guidance: R2 continuity reading (CPC only). Usually smaller than R1+R2.

ir_test_voltage_v.label: IR Test Voltage (V)
ir_test_voltage_v.ai_guidance: Test voltage used. Usually 500V for circuits over 50V. Use 250V for electronic equipment.

ir_live_live_mohm.label: IR L-L (Mohm)
ir_live_live_mohm.ai_guidance: IR reading between L-N. Must be >1M ohm. Typical values 50-200+ Mohm for healthy circuits.

ir_live_earth_mohm.label: IR L-E (Mohm)
ir_live_earth_mohm.ai_guidance: IR reading between L-E and N-E combined. Must be >1M ohm. Typical values 50-200+ Mohm. '>200' or '999' if meter maxed out.

polarity_confirmed.label: Polarity
polarity_confirmed.ai_guidance: Polarity confirmed correct. Usually 'OK' or 'Y' for pass. 'N' indicates reversed polarity (fault).

measured_zs_ohm.label: Measured Zs (ohm)
measured_zs_ohm.ai_guidance: Zs reading from loop impedance test. Must be less than max Zs for the OCPD. Typical domestic range 0.3-1.5 ohm.

rcd_time_ms.label: RCD Time (ms)
rcd_time_ms.ai_guidance: RCD trip time at rated current (1x IΔn). Must be <300ms for general RCDs, <40ms for S-type at 5x. Typical values 15-30ms.

rcd_button_confirmed.label: RCD Test Button
rcd_button_confirmed.ai_guidance: RCD test button checked and working. 'OK' or 'Y' for pass.

afdd_button_confirmed.label: AFDD Test Button
afdd_button_confirmed.ai_guidance: AFDD test button checked and working (if AFDD fitted). 'OK' or 'Y' for pass. Leave blank if no AFDD.

location.label: Location
location.ai_guidance: Where the board is installed, e.g., 'Under stairs', 'Garage', 'Utility room'

phases.label: Phases
phases.ai_guidance: Usually '1' for domestic single-phase. '3' for three-phase commercial.

earthing_arrangement.label: Earthing Arrangement
earthing_arrangement.ai_guidance: TN-C-S (PME) most common UK domestic. TN-S has separate earth. TT uses local earth electrode.

ze.label: Ze (ohm)
ze.ai_guidance: Ze reading at origin. TN-C-S typically <0.35 ohm. TN-S typically <0.8 ohm. TT can be much higher.

zs_at_db.label: Zs at DB (ohm)
zs_at_db.ai_guidance: Loop impedance at the board. Should be Ze + R1+R2 of main circuit.

ipf_at_db.label: Ipf at DB (kA)
ipf_at_db.ai_guidance: PFC/PSCC reading. Domestic typically 1-6kA. Must not exceed OCPD breaking capacity.

installation_details_fields._ui_description: Client information, premises details, and extent/limitations

client_name.label: Client Name
client_name.ai_guidance: Name of the client or property owner. Listen for 'Mrs Smith', 'Mr Jones', 'the tenant', etc.

address.label: Installation Address
address.ai_guidance: Full property address. Listen for street name, house number, town. Format: '14 High Street, Reading, Berkshire'

postcode.label: Postcode
postcode.ai_guidance: UK postcode format like 'RG1 1AA'. Listen for postcode mentioned separately.

town.label: Town/City
town.ai_guidance: Town or city if explicitly mentioned in transcript. Leave empty if not mentioned - will be resolved from postcode automatically.

county.label: County
county.ai_guidance: County if explicitly mentioned in transcript. Leave empty if not mentioned - will be resolved from postcode automatically.

premises_description.label: Description of Premises
premises_description.ai_guidance: Usually 'Residential' for houses/flats. 'Commercial' for shops/offices. 'Industrial' for factories/warehouses.

installation_records_available.label: Installation Records Available
installation_records_available.description: Whether previous installation records were available
installation_records_available.ai_guidance: Set to true if inspector mentions having previous certificates, records, or documentation available.

evidence_of_additions_alterations.label: Evidence of Additions/Alterations
evidence_of_additions_alterations.description: Evidence of additions or alterations not recorded
evidence_of_additions_alterations.ai_guidance: Set to true if inspector mentions seeing work that wasn't in the records, or alterations not certified.

date_of_inspection.label: Date of Inspection
date_of_inspection.description: Date the inspection/testing was carried out
date_of_inspection.ai_guidance: DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '18/03/2026'). Listen for 'today's date is', 'date of inspection', 'tested on', 'inspection date', 'carried out on'. If the electrician says a date near the start of a session without context, it's likely the inspection date.

date_of_previous_inspection.label: Date of Previous Inspection
date_of_previous_inspection.ai_guidance: DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., '15/06/2021'). Listen for 'previous inspection', 'last test', 'last inspection was', 'previous certificate dated'.

next_inspection_years.label: Recommended Interval (Years)
next_inspection_years.ai_guidance: Typically 5 years for domestic. 3 years for rented/HMO. Listen for 'recommend X years'.

extent.label: Extent of Installation Covered
extent.description: Description of what was covered by the inspection
extent.ai_guidance: What was inspected. Examples: 'Whole installation', 'Main consumer unit only', 'Excluding outbuildings', 'Ground floor only'.

agreed_limitations.label: Agreed Limitations
agreed_limitations.description: Any agreed limitations to the inspection
agreed_limitations.ai_guidance: What couldn't be accessed/inspected by agreement. Examples: 'No access to loft', 'Floor boxes not lifted', 'Tenant refused bedroom access'.

agreed_with.label: Limitations Agreed With
agreed_with.description: Name of person who agreed to limitations
agreed_with.ai_guidance: Who agreed to the limitations. Examples: 'Mrs Smith', 'The tenant', 'Property manager', 'John the landlord'.

operational_limitations.label: Operational Limitations
operational_limitations.ai_guidance: Technical limitations during testing. Examples: 'Could not isolate supply', 'Circuits could not be isolated', 'Freezer could not be turned off'.

supply_characteristics_fields._ui_description: Earthing arrangement, voltage, frequency, and supply protective device

earthing_arrangement.label: Earthing Arrangement
earthing_arrangement.ai_guidance: TN-C-S (PME) most common UK. Listen for 'PME', 'combined neutral earth', 'TN-C-S'. TN-S if 'separate earth', 'lead sheath earth'. TT if 'earth rod', 'earth electrode'.

live_conductors.label: Live Conductors
live_conductors.ai_guidance: Usually 'AC - 1-phase (2 wire)' for domestic single phase. 'AC - 3-phase (4 wire)' for three-phase commercial.

number_of_supplies.label: Number of Supplies
number_of_supplies.ai_guidance: Usually '1' for domestic. Multiple supplies in commercial or if separate meter for heating.

nominal_voltage_u.label: Nominal Voltage U (V)
nominal_voltage_u.ai_guidance: 230V for single phase domestic. 400V for three-phase.

nominal_voltage_uo.label: Nominal Voltage Uo (V)
nominal_voltage_uo.ai_guidance: 230V for UK domestic. Same as U for single-phase.

prospective_fault_current.label: Prospective Fault Current (kA)
prospective_fault_current.ai_guidance: Listen for 'PFC', 'prospective fault current', 'PSCC'. Typical domestic 1-6 kA. Format: '2.5' not '2.5kA'.

earth_loop_impedance_ze.label: External Earth Loop Impedance Ze (ohm)
earth_loop_impedance_ze.ai_guidance: Listen for 'Ze', 'external earth', 'earth loop at the meter'. TN-C-S typical <0.35. TN-S typical <0.8. Format: '0.32' ohms.

supply_polarity_confirmed.label: Supply Polarity Confirmed
supply_polarity_confirmed.description: Whether supply polarity was verified correct
supply_polarity_confirmed.ai_guidance: Set to true if inspector confirms polarity at origin is correct.

spd_bs_en.label: Supply Protective Device BS/EN
spd_bs_en.description: Standard number for supply protective device
spd_bs_en.ai_guidance: Standard for DNO supply cutout fuse (NOT the consumer's main switch). Common: 88-2.2 (BS fuse), 1361 (cartridge fuse). Only populate if a separate supply fuse/cutout is identified.

spd_type_supply.label: Supply Protective Device Type
spd_type_supply.ai_guidance: DNO supply cutout fuse type (NOT the consumer's main switch type). 'gG' for fuse, 'BS 88' for cutout. Only populate if a separate supply fuse/cutout is identified.

spd_short_circuit.label: Supply PD Short Circuit Capacity (kA)
spd_short_circuit.description: Breaking capacity of supply protective device
spd_short_circuit.ai_guidance: Breaking capacity of DNO supply cutout fuse (NOT the consumer's main switch). Usually 6kA domestic, higher for commercial.

spd_rated_current.label: Supply PD Rated Current (A)
spd_rated_current.description: Current rating of supply protective device
spd_rated_current.ai_guidance: DNO supply cutout fuse rating. NOT the consumer's main switch rating — do NOT copy the main switch value here. Only populate if a separate supply fuse/cutout is mentioned. Listen for 'cutout', 'supply fuse', 'DNO fuse'. Common: 60A, 80A, 100A.

means_earthing_distributor.label: Distributor's Facility
means_earthing_distributor.description: Means of earthing via distributor's facility
means_earthing_distributor.ai_guidance: Set to true if earthing is provided by the distributor (most common for TN-C-S/PME systems)

means_earthing_electrode.label: Earth Electrode
means_earthing_electrode.description: Means of earthing via earth electrode
means_earthing_electrode.ai_guidance: Set to true if installation has local earth electrode (TT systems). Listen for 'earth rod', 'earth spike', 'earth electrode'

earth_electrode_type.label: Earth Electrode Type
earth_electrode_type.ai_guidance: Listen for 'earth rod', 'earth plate', 'earth spike', 'foundation earth'. Only relevant for TT earthing arrangements.

earth_electrode_resistance.label: Earth Electrode Resistance (Ω)
earth_electrode_resistance.description: Measured resistance of earth electrode to earth
earth_electrode_resistance.ai_guidance: Earth resistance reading in ohms. Typical range 5-200 ohm for TT systems. Format as number, e.g., '12.5'

earth_electrode_location.label: Earth Electrode Location
earth_electrode_location.description: Physical location where earth electrode is installed
earth_electrode_location.ai_guidance: Where the electrode is physically located. Examples: 'Front garden', 'Outside meter box', 'Rear of property'

main_switch_bs_en.label: Main Switch BS(EN)
main_switch_bs_en.ai_guidance: Standard number for main switch. Common: 60947-3 (switch disconnector), 61008 (RCD), 60947-2 (MCCB)

main_switch_poles.label: Number of Poles
main_switch_poles.description: Number of poles on main switch
main_switch_poles.ai_guidance: Usually 2 for single-phase domestic (L+N switched), 4 for three-phase

main_switch_current.label: Main Switch Current (A)
main_switch_current.ai_guidance: Main switch rating. Listen for 'main switch rating', 'isolator'. Common domestic: 63A, 80A, 100A

main_switch_fuse_setting.label: Fuse Device Setting (A)
main_switch_fuse_setting.ai_guidance: Setting of adjustable fuse device. Often same as rated current for fixed devices.

main_switch_location.label: Main Switch Location
main_switch_location.ai_guidance: Where main switch is located. Examples: 'Integral to CU', 'Separate isolator above meter', 'Adjacent to meter'

main_switch_conductor_material.label: Main Conductor Material
main_switch_conductor_material.ai_guidance: Usually 'Copper' for meter tails in domestic. 'Aluminium' sometimes in older installations.

main_switch_conductor_csa.label: Main Conductor CSA (mm²)
main_switch_conductor_csa.ai_guidance: Size of meter tails. Common domestic: 16mm² (60A), 25mm² (100A). Listen for 'tails', 'meter cable size'

rcd_operating_current.label: RCD IΔn (mA)
rcd_operating_current.ai_guidance: Main RCD sensitivity if fitted. Usually 100mA or 300mA for main switch RCD.

rcd_time_delay.label: RCD Time Delay
rcd_time_delay.ai_guidance: Time delay if S-type RCD. Usually blank for non-delayed types.

rcd_operating_time.label: RCD Operating Time (ms)
rcd_operating_time.ai_guidance: Measured trip time of main RCD at rated current. Should be <300ms (or <150ms at 5x for S-type).

rcd_operating_current_test.label: RCD Operating Current Test Result (ohm)
rcd_operating_current_test.description: Actual test reading in ohms for RCD operating current
rcd_operating_current_test.ai_guidance: Numeric test result reading for the RCD operating current test. Enter the measured value in ohms.

rcd_time_delay_test.label: RCD Time Delay Test Result (ohm)
rcd_time_delay_test.description: Actual test reading in ohms for RCD time delay
rcd_time_delay_test.ai_guidance: Numeric test result reading for the RCD time delay test. Enter the measured value in ohms.

rcd_operating_time_test.label: RCD Operating Time Test Result (ohm)
rcd_operating_time_test.description: Actual test reading in ohms for RCD operating time
rcd_operating_time_test.ai_guidance: Numeric test result reading for the RCD operating time test. Enter the measured value in ohms.

earthing_conductor_material.label: Earthing Conductor Material
earthing_conductor_material.ai_guidance: Usually 'Copper' for earthing conductor. Listen for 'earth cable', 'earthing conductor'

earthing_conductor_csa.label: Earthing Conductor CSA (mm²)
earthing_conductor_csa.ai_guidance: Size of main earthing conductor. Minimum 10mm² Cu or 16mm² Al for TN-C-S.

earthing_conductor_continuity.label: Earthing Conductor Continuity
earthing_conductor_continuity.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if continuity verified satisfactory, 'FAIL' if broken/disconnected

bonding_conductor_csa.label: Bonding Conductor CSA (mm²)
bonding_conductor_csa.ai_guidance: Size of main bonding conductor in mm². Listen for: 'bonding size', 'earth bonding size', 'main bonding', 'bonding is X mil', 'bonding is X millimeter'. Minimum 10mm² for PME. Just extract the number (e.g., '10' for 10mm²).

bonding_water.label: Water Bonding
bonding_water.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if water bonding present and satisfactory. 'N/A' if no metallic water pipes

bonding_gas.label: Gas Bonding
bonding_gas.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if gas bonding present and satisfactory. 'N/A' if no gas supply

bonding_oil.label: Oil Bonding
bonding_oil.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if oil bonding present. 'N/A' if no oil supply (most common)

bonding_structural_steel.label: Structural Steel Bonding
bonding_structural_steel.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if structural steel bonded. 'N/A' if no exposed structural steel (most domestic)

bonding_lightning.label: Lightning Bonding
bonding_lightning.ai_guidance: 'PASS' if lightning protection bonded. 'N/A' if no lightning protection system (most common)

bonding_other.label: Other Bonding
bonding_other.ai_guidance: Other items bonded. Examples: 'Central heating', 'Air conditioning', 'Swimming pool'

bonding_other_na.label: Other Bonding N/A
bonding_other_na.description: Whether other bonding is not applicable
bonding_other_na.ai_guidance: Set to true if no other extraneous conductive parts require bonding at this installation.

name.label: Inspector Name
name.ai_guidance: Name of person conducting the inspection if mentioned.

enrolment_number.label: Enrolment Number
enrolment_number.ai_guidance: NICEIC, NAPIT, or other scheme registration number.

signature_file.label: Signature File
signature_file.ai_guidance: Not extracted from audio - managed via UI upload.

eic_extent_and_type_fields._ui_description: EIC-specific: Installation type and extent description

extent.label: Extent
extent.ai_guidance: What work was done. Examples: 'New consumer unit', 'New kitchen circuits', 'Full rewire', 'Addition of shower circuit'.

installation_type.label: Installation Type
installation_type.description: Type of work: new, addition, or alteration
installation_type.ai_guidance: 'new_installation' for full new install/rewire. 'addition' for adding new circuits. 'alteration' for modifying existing.

comments.label: Comments
comments.ai_guidance: Any additional notes about the installation work.

departures_from_bs7671.label: Departures from BS7671
departures_from_bs7671.description: Whether there are any departures from the wiring regulations
departures_from_bs7671.ai_guidance: Listen for 'departure', 'doesn't comply', 'non-compliant'. Usually 'None' for compliant installations.

departure_details.label: Departure Details
departure_details.ai_guidance: Explanation of what doesn't comply and why it's acceptable.

inspection_schedule_fields._ui_description: BS7671 inspection checklist items - outcomes for each schedule item
inspection_schedule_fields._ai_guidance: The inspection schedule is a checklist of BS7671 items. Each item gets an outcome. Link observations to specific schedule items using the schedule_item field. Common items to flag: 3.6 (bonding size), 4.4 (fire-rated CU), 4.9 (circuit labelling), 5.12.1 (RCD protection for sockets).

code.label: Code
code.description: Observation classification code per BPG4 Issue 7.1
code.ai_guidance: C1=Danger present (immediate), C2=Potentially dangerous, C3=Improvement recommended, FI=Further investigation, NC=Non-conformity (not recorded on EICR)

item_location.label: Item/Location
item_location.ai_guidance: Where the issue was found, e.g., 'Kitchen socket', 'Consumer unit', 'Bathroom light'

observation_text.label: Observation
observation_text.ai_guidance: Clear description of the defect or issue found. Describe the defect, not the remedy.

regulation.label: Regulation
regulation.ai_guidance: Include BOTH the regulation number AND the actual regulation text. Example: 'Reg 411.3.3 — Compliance with the requirements for automatic disconnection of supply'

bpg4_basis.label: BPG4 Basis
bpg4_basis.description: BPG4 classification basis for the assigned code
bpg4_basis.ai_guidance: Brief explanation of why this code was assigned, referencing the BPG4 table entry if one matches. Null if the electrician explicitly stated the code.

suppress_from_report.label: Suppress from Report
suppress_from_report.description: Whether to suppress this observation from the EICR certificate
suppress_from_report.ai_guidance: Set to true for NC observations that should not appear on the EICR certificate but are logged for the electrician's information.
